assessment: The Multi-Angle Parallel Review Agents implementation meets the plan scope. Empty reviewAngles (General checkbox) spawns one general review agent with scope + code quality prompt; 1+ angles spawn N parallel angle-specific agents with focused prompts. Aggregation correctly requires all to approve, merges rejection feedback, and treats any no_result as failure. Active agents list and TaskDetailSidebar show each reviewer with angle label (e.g. 'Reviewer (Security)'). Settings helptext and Review agents section are updated. All 1895 tests pass.
